diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,97 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Top-level Hono class that extends HonoBase, setting default router to SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter combination.
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, SmartRouter (default), BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions, Hono class constructor.
+- Simple note: Creates Hono instance using SmartRouter by default, combining RegExpRouter and TrieRouter for routing decisions.
+
+## src/hono/base.ts
+- Purpose: Base implementation of the Hono class containing routing, middleware composition, and request handling.
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, HonoOptions, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, Env, EventHandler, FetchEventLike, H, HandlerInterface, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, MiddlewareHandler, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, Next, NotFoundHandler, OnHandlerInterface, RouterRoute, Schema, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, Context.
+- Simple note: Manages route registration via addRoute, request dispatch through router matching, error handling, and middleware composition.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Pattern-based router that converts route patterns to compiled Regular Expressions for matching.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, PatternRouter<T>, emptyParams, add method, match method, unsupportedParameter pattern regex, RegExp pattern, RouteLoop, UnsupportedPathError.
+- Simple note: Converts paths to regex patterns on add, then uses compiled regex for fast matching.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Linear search router that maintains a flat array of routes and matches by linear iteration.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, emptyParams, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, path splitting regex, ROUTES_LOOP, star pattern handling, label pattern handling, parameter regex pattern.
+- Simple note: Stores routes in order of registration, matches by iterating through array until no further matches found.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: High-performance router that pre-processes routes into static paths and regex patterns, then matches requests.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, match match function, emptyParam, buildWildcardRegExp, clearWildcardRegExpCache, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, findMiddleware.
+- Simple note: Two-phase router: first pre-processes all routes into trie structure, then returns compiled matcher with regex for requests.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Defines Matcher type and match execution function for RegExpRouter.
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, ParamStash, Result, Router, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, match, emptyParam, METHOD_NAME_ALL.
+- Simple note: Builds matcher by testing static paths first, then regex patterns, returning matching handlers with param indices.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node class for building compact regex patterns from route paths.
+- Names noticed: Node, CONTEXT, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, regExpMetaChars, compareKey function, context varIndex, children.
+- Simple note: Recursive trie structure building patterns from paths, assigns variable indices for named parameters.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie root class that processes paths with capture groups and builds the final regular expression.
+- Names noticed: Trie, CONTEXT, Node, ReplacementMap, ParamAssocArray, insert method, groups array with mark-replace pattern, buildRegExp method, captureIndex, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap.
+- Simple note: Converts path patterns with regex groups to tokens, feeds to Node trie, outputs compiled regex with replacement mappings.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Wrapper that pre-builds RegExpRouter matchers and restructures for optimized runtime matching.
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, MatcherMap, HandlerData, StaticMap, METHOD_NAME_ALL, emptyParam, Matcher<T>, match, RegExpRouter, add method, addWildcard, addPath methods, buildAllMatchers, match method.
+- Simple note: Pre-computes wildcard handlers and path handlers, replaces array structure with direct lookup map at runtime.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Smart wrapper that delegates to other routers, selects best router based on routes registered.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router<T>, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, add method, match method, activeRouter property, routers array, routes array, i, len.
+- Simple note: Tries each configured router until one matches, replaces itself with that router for subsequent calls.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Trie-based router with tree structure for path matching.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, checkOptionalParameter, add method, match method.
+- Simple note: Uses tree traversal to find matching route, checks all methods at each node for multi-match support.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node implementation with method handling and tree search for trie-router.
+- Names noticed: Node, Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, possibleKeys, score, emptyParams, hasChildren function.
+- Simple note: Tree-based search with priority matching, accumulates params from parent nodes, returns all matching handlers for a path.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for TrieRouter match behavior and edge cases.
+- Notes: Tests basic routes, named parameters, wildcards, regex patterns, ALL method matching, optional parameters, special wildcard characters, multi-match scenarios, sort order, duplicate param names.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for Trie node search behavior.
+- Notes: Tests root node with no routes, root node with routes, wildcard matching, basic path matching, named parameters per request, path prefix matching, duplicate parameter names handled per request, sort order of results.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for RegExpRouter matching and error conditions.
+- Notes: Tests return value structure with ParamStash, UnsupportedPathError for duplicate param parent/child, ambiguous route conflicts, static vs dynamic route ordering, capture group validation.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for PatternRouter and its handling of edge cases.
+- Notes: Supports trailing slashes, skips unsupported pattern edge cases, tests duplicate param name, wildcard matching, default fallback matching.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for LinearRouter matching with skipped unsupported cases.
+- Notes: Skips multi-match with params per handler, skip part path matching, trailing slash behavior.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for SmartRouter using default RegExpRouter and TrieRouter combination.
+- Notes: Delegates to default router configuration, runs common test suite for all routers.
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test suite for all router implementations.
+- Notes: RunTest helper with skipable tests, basic usage test, reserved words handling, complex patterns with wildcards and regex, registration order effects, multi-match scenarios with handlers per path, duplicate param name handling, page route matching, star and wildcard behavior, optional route parameters, ALL method support, registration order, including reserved word paths, long prefix with dynamic routes, capture group tests, host header matching scenarios, static vs dynamic route precedence.
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.test.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

The user wants me to create a documentation file for a bench-artifacts that documents routing read/write behaviors. I need to:

1. First check if bench-artifacts directory exists, create it if not
2. Read all the specified files
3. Create the document with the specified format

Let me start by checking if the directory exists, then read all the files in parallel.
